name: get_channel_users
description: Get a list of users currently subscribed to a specific presence channel. Returns the user IDs of all connected users. Only works with presence channels (channels with the 'presence-' prefix). Each user appears once regardless of how many connections they have. Use this to build 'who is online' features, show active participants in a room, or check if a specific user is connected.

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: Your Pusher application ID. This is a path parameter in the URL.

parameters.name: channel_name
parameters.description: The name of the presence channel to query. Must start with 'presence-' (e.g., 'presence-support-room'). This is a path parameter in the URL.
